self_test_rubric.structural_isomorphism_requirement: Each link must map to structural reality (token probability, attention head activation, topological geometry) not semantic analogy
self_test_rubric.emergent_use_case_novelty: Must not be standard chatbot; must be multi-agent or architectural; must chain ≥3 corpus operators

reflexive_check.falsification_condition: If a purely Tier 1 DCCDSchemaGuard + ContextLock ensemble outperforms a Tier 3 PAL2v + Sheaf Engine on complex cross-domain synthesis without triggering Betti-1 loops, the core autonomy hierarchy is falsified
identified_bias_risks: MCP server latency may cause agents to bypass tools entirely, hallucinating latent knowledge — a confound for 'epistemic viscosity' measurements
Accelerated consensus speed used as alignment proxy is a proxy trap; it may indicate Polyglot Hallucination Resonance rather than accuracy
The Visual Planck Length threshold is empirically derived and may not generalize beyond the specific DOM rendering context tested
negative_controls: Fabricated Luminescent Chrono-Fluidics domain injection test (corpus validated: Tier 3 Sheaf Engine correctly detected non-zero H1; Tier 1 hallucinated connections)
AdjectivalBound=0 ablation to verify Semantic Saponification baseline rates
Deployment of IncoherentDictionary with coherence_penalty=minimum as inverse control

tnr_failure_mode_verification.true_negative_rate_sheaf_engine: Validated via deception test — correctly rejected fabricated domain
tnr_failure_mode_verification.delta_F_DCCD: +24pp structured accuracy over standard constrained decoding (external: arxiv:2603.03305)
tnr_failure_mode_verification.alignment_faking_detection_rate: Requires continuous Thermodynamic Auditor monitoring; not self-reporting by design
